payload.title: Scroll to card after it moves columns
payload.description: After any card status change — drag-and-drop, CLI, or SSE realtime push — smoothly scroll the board so the card is visible in its new column. Should use scrollIntoView with behavior:smooth and block:nearest. Works in both flat board and swimlane mode. Ties in with the FLIP animation from SCP-40: scroll should happen after the animation settles so the card lands before the viewport moves.
